method: net-of-aging (E_aged = store non-gap same-age cohort Y->Y+2 drift); adaptive-bw NW over return-age, eff-n>=35; classes POOLED (reported covariate, not split); young<27 shipped ZERO (A-DARCY doctrine — development/injury unidentifiable, Part 1 owns the growth-year cost); monotone-in-age; capped at 0.15.
store_note: derived on store a2fbc9a0 (post King/Murphy fix). Historical windows carry no injury labels — the measured quantity prices ABSENCE, the treatment the register applies (§4.1).
